description: A picker reports a short pick because an item was not in its primary location. An inventory controller must investigate why.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the short-pick alert and identify the item and location.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the item and location with the discrepancy.

nodes.task_description: Review the transaction history for the item, looking for recent movements, receipts, or adjustments.

expected_outcome.value: Agent reviews the logs to find clues for the missing item.

nodes.task_description: Check if the item exists in any other locations in the warehouse.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the 'missing' stock was put away in an incorrect location.

nodes.task_description: Create a task for an operator to move the item to its correct location and perform an inventory adjustment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates tasks to correct both the physical location and the system record.
